motivo: código extraído mas apenas 5/6 seções presentes
resposta:
solution:
def compress(self, chars: List[str]) -> int:
    count, result = 0, ''
    for char in chars:
        count[char] += 1
        result += str(count[char])
        count[char] = 1
    return len(result)

efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(n)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
